summary: Dashboard widgets fail to load when timezone is set to UTC+13
description: {"type":"doc","version":1,"content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"When the user's timezone is set to UTC+13, dashboard widgets throw a parsing error and display 'Failed to load data'."}]}]}
